verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit eo tempore vir quidam de monte Ephraim nomine Michas,
verses.douay_rheims: There was at that time a man of mount Ephraim, whose name was Michas.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja yksi mies oli Ephraimin vuorelta, nimeltä Miika.
verses.king_james: And there was a man of mount Ephraim, whose name was Micah.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui dixit matri suæ : Mille et centum argenteos, quos separaveras tibi, et super quibus me audiente juraveras, ecce ego habeo, et apud me sunt. Cui illa respondit : Benedictus filius meus Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לְאִמּ֡וֹ אֶ֩לֶף֩ וּמֵאָ֨ה הַכֶּ֜סֶף אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֻֽקַּֽח־לָ֗ךְ (ואתי) [וְאַ֤תְּ] אָלִית֙ וְגַם֙ אָמַ֣רְתְּ בְּאׇזְנַ֔י הִנֵּה־הַכֶּ֥סֶף אִתִּ֖י אֲנִ֣י לְקַחְתִּ֑יו וַתֹּ֣אמֶר אִמּ֔וֹ בָּר֥וּךְ בְּנִ֖י לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who said to his mother: The eleven hundred pieces of silver, which thou hadst put aside for thyself, and concerning which thou didst swear in my hearing, behold I have, and they are with me. And she said to him. Blessed be my son by the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän sanoi äidillensä: ne tuhannen ja sata hopiapenninkiä, jotka sinulta otettiin, joiden tähden sinä kirosit ja puhuit minun korvaini kuullen: katso, ne ovat minun tykönäni, minä ne otin. Silloin sanoi hänen äitinsä: siunattu olet sinä, minun poikani, Herralle.
verses.king_james: And he said unto his mother, The eleven hundred shekels of silver that were taken from thee, about which thou cursedst, and spakest of also in mine ears, behold, the silver is with me; I took it. And his mother said, Blessed be thou of the Lord, my son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reddidit ergo eos matri suæ, quæ dixerat ei : Consecravi et vovi hoc argentum Domino, ut de manu mea suscipiat filius meus, et faciat sculptile atque conflatile : et nunc trado illud tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛שֶׁב אֶת־אֶלֶף־וּמֵאָ֥ה הַכֶּ֖סֶף לְאִמּ֑וֹ וַתֹּ֣אמֶר אִמּ֡וֹ הַקְדֵּ֣שׁ הִקְדַּ֣שְׁתִּי אֶת־הַכֶּ֩סֶף֩ לַיהֹוָ֨ה מִיָּדִ֜י לִבְנִ֗י לַֽעֲשׂוֹת֙ פֶּ֣סֶל וּמַסֵּכָ֔ה וְעַתָּ֖ה אֲשִׁיבֶ֥נּוּ לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So he restored them to his mother, who said to him: I have consecrated and vowed this silver to the Lord, that my son may receive it at my hand, and make a graven and a molten god; so now I deliver it to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin antoi hän äidillensä ne tuhannen ja sata hopiapenninkiä jälleen. Ja hänen äitinsä sanoi: minä pyhitin kokonansa sen rahan Herralle minun kädestäni poikani edestä, tehdä kaivettua ja valettua kuvaa; ja nyt annan minä sinulle sen jällensä.
verses.king_james: And when he had restored the eleven hundred shekels of silver to his mother, his mother said, I had wholly dedicated the silver unto the Lord from my hand for my son, to make a graven image and a molten image: now therefore I will restore it unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reddidit igitur eos matri suæ : quæ tulit ducentos argenteos, et dedit eos argentario, ut faceret ex eis sculptile atque conflatile, quod fuit in domo Michæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥שֶׁב אֶת־הַכֶּ֖סֶף לְאִמּ֑וֹ וַתִּקַּ֣ח אִמּוֹ֩ מָאתַ֨יִם כֶּ֜סֶף וַתִּתְּנֵ֣הוּ לַצּוֹרֵ֗ף וַֽיַּעֲשֵׂ֙הוּ֙ פֶּ֣סֶל וּמַסֵּכָ֔ה וַֽיְהִ֖י בְּבֵ֥ית מִיכָֽיְהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he restored them to his mother: and she took two hundred pieces of silver and gave them to the silversmith, to make of them a graven and a molten God, which was in the house of Michas.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän antoi sen rahan äidillensä jälleen. Ja hänen äitinsä otti kaksisataa hopiapenninkiä ja antoi ne hopiasepälle; hän teki kaivetun ja valetun kuvan, joka sitte oli Miikan huoneessa.
verses.king_james: Yet he restored the money unto his mother; and his mother took two hundred shekels of silver, and gave them to the founder, who made thereof a graven image and a molten image: and they were in the house of Micah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ædiculam quoque in ea deo separavit, et fecit ephod, et theraphim, id est, vestem sacerdotalem, et idola : implevitque unius filiorum suorum manum, et factus est ei sacerdos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאִ֣ישׁ מִיכָ֔ה ל֖וֹ בֵּ֣ית אֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיַּ֤עַשׂ אֵפוֹד֙ וּתְרָפִ֔ים וַיְמַלֵּ֗א אֶת־יַ֤ד אַחַד֙ מִבָּנָ֔יו וַֽיְהִי־ל֖וֹ לְכֹהֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he separated also therein a little temple for the god, and made an ephod, and theraphim, that is to say, a priestly garment, and idols: and he filled the hand of one of his sons, and he became his priest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Miikalla oli Jumalan huone, ja hän teki päällisvaatteen ja epäjumalan kuvat, ja täytti yhden poikansa kädet, ja hän oli hänen pappinsa.
verses.king_james: And the man Micah had an house of gods, and made an ephod, and teraphim, and consecrated one of his sons, who became his priest.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus illis non erat rex in Israël, sed unusquisque quod sibi rectum videbatur, hoc faciebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיָּמִ֣ים הָהֵ֔ם אֵ֥ין מֶ֖לֶךְ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אִ֛ישׁ הַיָּשָׁ֥ר בְּעֵינָ֖יו יַעֲשֶֽׂה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In those days there was no king in Israel, but every one did that which seemed right to himself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin ei ollut kuningasta Israelissa, ja itsekukin teki niinkuin heille näkyi hyväksi.
verses.king_james: In those days there was no king in Israel, but every man did that which was right in his own eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit quoque alter adolescens de Bethlehem Juda, ex cognatione ejus : eratque ipse Levites, et habitabat ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי־נַ֗עַר מִבֵּ֥ית לֶ֙חֶם֙ יְהוּדָ֔ה מִמִּשְׁפַּ֖חַת יְהוּדָ֑ה וְה֥וּא לֵוִ֖י וְה֥וּא גָֽר־שָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: There was also another young man of Bethlehem Juda, of the kindred thereof: and he was a Levite, and dwelt there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nuorukainen oli Juudan Betlehemistä, Juudan sukukunnasta, ja se oli Leviläinen, joka oli siellä muukalaisena.
verses.king_james: And there was a young man out of Beth–lehem–judah of the family of Judah, who was a Levite, and he sojourned there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressusque de civitate Bethlehem, peregrinari voluit ubicumque sibi commodum reperisset. Cumque venisset in montem Ephraim, iter faciens, et declinasset parumper in domum Michæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨לֶךְ הָאִ֜ישׁ מֵהָעִ֗יר מִבֵּ֥ית לֶ֙חֶם֙ יְהוּדָ֔ה לָג֖וּר בַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר יִמְצָ֑א וַיָּבֹ֧א הַר־אֶפְרַ֛יִם עַד־בֵּ֥ית מִיכָ֖ה לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת דַּרְכּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now he went out from the city of Bethlehem, and desired to sojourn wheresoever he should find it convenient for him. And when he was come to mount Ephraim, as he was on his journey, and had turned aside a little into the house of Michas,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän meni Betlehemistä Juudan kaupungista vaeltamaan, kuhunka hän joutuis. Ja kuin hän tuli Ephraimin vuorelle Miikan huoneesen, vaeltaen,
verses.king_james: And the man departed out of the city from Beth–lehem–judah to sojourn where he could find a place: and he came to mount Ephraim to the house of Micah, as he journeyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: interrogatus est ab eo unde venisset. Qui respondit : Levita sum de Bethlehem Juda, et vado ut habitem ubi potuero, et utile mihi esse perspexero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּֽאמֶר־ל֥וֹ מִיכָ֖ה מֵאַ֣יִן תָּב֑וֹא וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלָ֜יו לֵוִ֣י אָנֹ֗כִי מִבֵּ֥ית לֶ֙חֶם֙ יְהוּדָ֔ה וְאָנֹכִ֣י הֹלֵ֔ךְ לָג֖וּר בַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר אֶמְצָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was asked by him whence he came. And he answered: I am a Levite of Bethlehem Juda, and I am going to dwell where I can, and where I shall find a place to my advantage.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kysyi Miika häneltä: kustas tulet? Leviläinen vastasi: minä olen Leviläinen Betlehemistä Juudan maalta, ja vaellan, kuhunka minä parhain taidan.
verses.king_james: And Micah said unto him, Whence comest thou? And he said unto him, I am a Levite of Beth–lehem–judah, and I go to sojourn where I may find a place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Michas : Mane apud me, et esto mihi parens ac sacerdos : daboque tibi per annos singulos decem argenteos, ac vestem duplicem, et quæ ad victum sunt necessaria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ ל֨וֹ מִיכָ֜ה שְׁבָ֣ה עִמָּדִ֗י וֶֽהְיֵה־לִי֮ לְאָ֣ב וּלְכֹהֵן֒ וְאָנֹכִ֨י אֶֽתֶּן־לְךָ֜ עֲשֶׂ֤רֶת כֶּ֙סֶף֙ לַיָּמִ֔ים וְעֵ֥רֶךְ בְּגָדִ֖ים וּמִחְיָתֶ֑ךָ וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ הַלֵּוִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Michas said: Stay with me, and be unto me a father and a priest, and I will give thee every year ten pieces of silver, and a double suit of apparel, and thy victuals.
verses.finnish_biblia: Miika sanoi hänelle: olen minun tykönäni. Sinun pitää oleman minun isäni ja pappini, ja minä annan sinulle vuosi vuodelta kymmenen hopiapenninkiä ja määrätyt vaatteet ja elatukses; ja Leviläinen meni hänen kanssansa.
verses.king_james: And Micah said unto him, Dwell with me, and be unto me a father and a priest, and I will give thee ten shekels of silver by the year, and a suit of apparel, and thy victuals. So the Levite went in.

verses.latin_vulgate: Acquievit, et mansit apud hominem, fuitque illi quasi unus de filiis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֥וֹאֶל הַלֵּוִ֖י לָשֶׁ֣בֶת אֶת־הָאִ֑ישׁ וַיְהִ֤י הַנַּ֙עַר֙ ל֔וֹ כְּאַחַ֖ד מִבָּנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was content, and abode with the man, and was unto him as one of his sons.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Leviläinen rupesi olemaan sen miehen tykönä, ja hän piti sen nuorukaisen niinkuin yhden pojistansa.
verses.king_james: And the Levite was content to dwell with the man; and the young man was unto him as one of his sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Implevitque Michas manum ejus, et habuit puerum sacerdotem apud se :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְמַלֵּ֤א מִיכָה֙ אֶת־יַ֣ד הַלֵּוִ֔י וַֽיְהִי־ל֥וֹ הַנַּ֖עַר לְכֹהֵ֑ן וַיְהִ֖י בְּבֵ֥ית מִיכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Michas filled his hand, and had the young man with him for his priest, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Miika täytti Leviläisen käden, että hän oli hänen pappinsa, ja hän asui Miikan huoneessa.
verses.king_james: And Micah consecrated the Levite; and the young man became his priest, and was in the house of Micah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc scio, dicens, quod benefaciet mihi Deus habenti Levitici generis sacerdotem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר מִיכָ֔ה עַתָּ֣ה יָדַ֔עְתִּי כִּֽי־יֵיטִ֥יב יְהֹוָ֖ה לִ֑י כִּ֧י הָֽיָה־לִ֛י הַלֵּוִ֖י לְכֹהֵֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Now I know God will do me good, since I have a priest of the race of the Levites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Miika sanoi: nyt minä tiedän Herran minulle hyvää tekevän, että minulla on Leviläinen pappina.
verses.king_james: Then said Micah, Now know I that the Lord will do me good, seeing I have a Levite to my priest.
